title: Lead Instructional Designer at Amity University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Amity University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
